title: rosa communis var. trichoidea
intro: Rosa communis var. trichoidea, also known as the prickly wild rose, is a variant of the common rose plant with thorny stems and fragrant flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa communis var. trichoidea include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, and are often used to promote skin health and reduce stress.
